item.title: RT @builtwithjon: @NousResearch @Teknium - Nice UI - very Writer of you. First thing I did was deac...

item.title:
Really exciting to see teams building with M2.7 at the YC robotics hackathon!
Congrats to Team Wild...
item.description:
Really exciting to see teams building with M2.7 at the YC robotics hackathon!
Congrats to Team Wild Robot on the innovative skill generation pipeline, and thanks to @VictorSuOrtiz for sharing this from the ground. Looking to see more of this!
--- @MiniMax_AI | ❤️ 13 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 934
item.author: @MiniMax_AI
